case_title: BLOISE, ALEX et al vs. PENNINGTON, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID GELLMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. MICHAEL NELSON PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF. DAVID PENNINGTON NOT PRESENT, BUT MR. NELSON STATES HE IS AUTHORIZED TO ENTER INTO SETTLEMENT FOR BOTH HIMSELF & MR. PENNINGTON. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 168 ALBION ST, S.F, CA. - FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - $1,916 RENT & DAMGES - EVICTION STAYED TO 9-24-93 & IF DEFS. VACATE BY THIS DATE, PL. WAIVES COSTS & ATTY FEES - $1,500 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE CREDITED TO THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT - NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE GRANTED. PL ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENNINGTON, DAVID NELSON, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 168 ALBION ST, S.F, CA. $1,916.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,916.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-24-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFS VACATE BY 9-24-93 & PAY R&D BY 10-31-93, $1050 SEC DEP WILL BE CREDITED TOWARD MONEY JUDGMENT & PL WILL WAIVE COSTS & ATTY FEES. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $38.33. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOISE, ALEX MORALES, ESTHER
